name: A 2-minute Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish, stir together powdered sugar, cocoa, salt, milk, and vanilla until partially blended (it will be too stiff to blend thoroughly).
2. Place butter in the center of the dish.
3. Microwave at high for 2 minutes, or until smooth. If not all butter has melted during cooking, it will melt as the mixture is stirred.
4. Blend in chopped nuts.
5. Pour into a lightly-buttered 8x4x3-inch dish.
6. Chill for 1 hour in the refrigerator or 20 to 30 minutes in the freezer.
7. Cut into squares. Makes about 36 squares.
